title: worm
body:
https://soundcloud.com/billy-moreno/desert-life?in=billy-moreno/sets/scrub/s-f8srbarqnim&si=b88a3dc2fc9b4056be60e01a3f3eeec4



verse 1

paul atreides with the thumper
shuffle through the desert when i wanna duck the hunter
can't sit still though gotta date with hunger
and a hunger for the date
keep the hooks on my side till its time to ride
check the numbers on my plate
when survival means walking funny i ain't the ruler to set you straight
but i really wanna know, when's the last time you ate

verse 2

i've made drugs that go to kids
never sold em myself but i know who did
and i've hoped nobody notices
see i know what hope is
i know what dope is
i know about copin
i know about openin up get popped stung and closin shop
i know about the walls safes doors and locks
i know about a lot still lack definition
know a lotta tricks still don't get the mission
i know about the cross an the crucifixion
i know about the rope an the necks its chokin
i know about losin
i know about gettin tight over loose ends
i know i'm not translucent
i'm tryin and dying
that's the two facts
that give me comfort when i'm lyin in the dark
conspiring what to do next
sometimes i relax and that's the true flex
cuz every time i see the moves i learn some new steps
every time i catch the flow i discover new depths
and i still believe i'll uncover the route to you yet
that's the connect
so with all due respect
am i comin correct?
